description_long: This is a classic three-armed candelabrum with a metallic, likely brass or bronze, structure and three tall, white taper candles. The candelabrum features a central stem with geometric facets and two elegantly curved arms extending symmetrically from the center, each ending in a candle holder. The base is wide and faceted, providing stability and a decorative touch. Each candle holder is cup-shaped, securely holding the candles upright. The candles themselves are smooth, cylindrical, and unlit, with no visible wax drips or flames. The overall design is ornate yet functional, suitable for formal or decorative urban settings such as restaurant tables, event halls, or outdoor garden parties.
description: A three-armed metallic candelabrum with three tall, white taper candles, featuring a faceted base and elegant curved arms. The design is ornate and suitable for decorative urban settings.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing all three arms and candles, highlighting the symmetrical design and faceted base.
description_view_1: Side view showing the alignment of the central candle and the depth of the arms, with only one arm and candle fully visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the three arms and candles from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the central candle and one arm in profile.
